title: calopyxis alata
intro: Calopyxis alata, also known as the Winged Calophyllum, is a species of flowering plant in the family Calophyllaceae. This plant has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, including anti-inflammatory, antibacterial, and antifungal properties. The health benefits of Calopyxis alata include reducing fever, relieving pain, and treating various skin conditions, such as eczema and wounds. The plant can be prepared into herbal preparations like teas, infusions, and ointments, which are often used in folk remedies to promote healing and alleviate symptoms.
